objective: Stratégie sur NEARUSDC 30m. Le marché (crypto) sur est sélectionné. Sur cet horizon temporel, l'objectif consiste à utiliser les indicateurs suivants : AROON + EMA pour identifier des breakouts dans un contexte de tendance, ainsi que la fibonacci_levels (Fibo) et MACD en conjonction avec une combinaison originale d'un filtre anti-faux-signaux adapté au régime de marche du marché. Pour les entrées, l'objectif doit être conditionnel aux conditions suivantes : une attaque d'asymetrie long/court avec seuil differents et un filtre anti-faux-signais adapté au régime de marche du marché. Pour le risk management, la stop loss (SL) sera placée à 3% en dessous du niveau Fibo, tandis que le take profit (TP) est fixé à une extension Fibo des breakouts identifiés par l'AROON + EMA. L'objectif doit être testable et falsifiable grâce aux hypothèses suivantes : les entrées seront validées ou infirmées indépendamment en fonction de leur pertinence comparative avec la sort

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Aroon, EMA and a custom made filter to identify trends in the market, Bollinger Bands, Keltner Channels, Donchian Channels for volatility levels, MACD for trend strength along with Fibonacci Levels , RSI, Stochastic Oscillator, Momentum, On-Balance Volume(OBV), Commodity Channel Index (CCI), Average Directional Movement Index(ADX) and a combination of custom filter to avoid false signals in ranging markets will work together as a system which can provide more accurate buy/sell opportunities

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy combines multiple indicators to identify buy/sell opportunities in trending and ranging markets. It uses Aroon, EMA, Fibonacci Levels, MACD for trend identification and other oscillators such as Bollinger Bands, Keltner Channels, Donchian Channels and CCI for volatility levels. Momentum is added through On-Balance Volume (OBV) and the Average Directional Movement Index (ADX). The system also uses a custom filter to avoid false signals in ranging markets. A risk management stop loss at 3% below Fibonacci Levels with take profit extension based on level breakouts are included. If results are poor, increasing the timeframe or changing the filters could be considered.
[Backup plan] 1) Overfitting: The strategy may be too complex and not generalize well to other timeframes or markets. To address this, simplifying the system by removing unnecessary indicators, keeping only relevant ones for a specific market condition can improve its effectiveness. 2) Negative Return: If results are poor (negative return), analyzing backtest performance during historical periods where the strategy performed poorly could help in identifying potential issues and rectifying them. 3) Low Sharpe ratio: Adjusting parameters such as changing ATR calculation, filter type or setting a more conservative stop loss can increase the overall profitability of the system while maintaining its risk management features.
